unarmed.description: When you have nothing else, you are the weapon yourself!

small_knife.description: It hardly looks like a weapon, but it grants confidence. Don't cut yourself!

machete.description: You won't get lost in the urban jungle or the real one.

large_club.description: An undeniable plus — this weapon can literally be found lying under your feet.

baseball_bat.description: It's odd to carry this everywhere. But perhaps you just really love the sport?

axe.description: Useful for chores, but quite suspicious in the city.

revolver_38.description: A reliable .38 caliber sidearm that won't let you be bullied.

automatic_pistol_45.description: More expensive than a revolver, but faster to reload. A heavy-duty Colt M1911.

shotgun_12g_2_barrel.description: Are you going to war with evil? Devastating at point-blank range.

rifle_30_06.description: A powerful bolt-action rifle for long-range defense.

bow.description: Weaker than a firearm, but completely silent.

hand_grenade.description: The black market sends greetings to everyone within a 5-meter radius!

dynamite.description: A 1lb stick. Destroys everything nearby, but not exactly easy to purchase legally.

tommy_gun.description: The Thompson Submachine Gun. The 'Chicago Typewriter' — preferred by mobsters and desperate investigators.

brass_knuckles.description: Perfect for bar brawls and street justice.
